scenarios.capability: Produce deterministic reproduction steps for a reported UI bug
scenarios.reason: The agent can read a bug description and produce a written reproduction recipe without executing a browser.

scenarios.capability: Plan and document a baseline-vs-changed evidence capture session
scenarios.reason: The agent can produce the correct script invocations and output paths for a given scenario without running a live server.

scenarios.capability: Identify anti-patterns in a provided debug log or process description
scenarios.reason: The agent can read a provided description and identify which anti-patterns from the skill are violated.

scenarios.capability: Write a stakeholder-ready UI debug report from provided artifacts
scenarios.reason: The agent can compose a structured report using evidence templates from the skill's references.

scenarios.capability: Diagnose and resolve a failed capture-evidence.sh run using troubleshooting guidance
scenarios.reason: The agent can map a described error to the troubleshooting section and produce the correct remediation commands.
